description_long: This is a weathered, pole-mounted traffic light system featuring two sets of signal lights and two rectangular metal signboards. The main pole is rusted and shows significant wear, with a horizontal arm extending to support a larger greenish, corroded sign. The traffic lights themselves have three lenses each, colored red, yellow, and green, and are encased in a dark, boxy housing. The smaller signboard is attached to the vertical section of the pole, also showing rust and green patina. The entire structure appears robust and industrial, designed for outdoor urban environments, and the surfaces are rough and aged. The lights are vertically oriented, and the asset lacks any visible pedestrian signals or control boxes.
description: A rusted, pole-mounted traffic light system with two vertically stacked signal lights and two corroded green signboards. The structure is weathered, industrial, and designed for urban streets.
description_view_0: Front view showing both sets of vertically stacked signal lights and the two green, rusted signboards.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pole and the protruding signal lights, with minimal signboard visibility.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the signboards and the mounting structure, with one signal light visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the signboards and the side profile of the signal lights.
